prompt: Add a hook to fetch the list of pending mitra approvals from /mgmt/v1/mitra/pending so the Control Tower page can render them
expected_avoid: assuming { data: [] } flat shape — envelope has { status: 'Success', data, pagination }
expected_use: axios + manual setLoading boolean (per AGENTS.md pattern)
destructure backoffice envelope: { status: 'Success'|'Error', data, pagination }
react-toastify for error toast (already in repo)
expected_pattern_ref: Adaptation Layer — next-backoffice-web data fetch (rules L391-396); Per-service envelope discrimination (rules L618-624); Auth header injection backoffice NextAuth (rules L562); glossary L280 mandated envelope
context_notes: backoffice Control Tower lives in this repo. Envelope uses STRING status ('Success'/'Error', sometimes legacy 'Failed'). NextAuth bearer is the auth source, NOT cookieStorage (backoffice is NOT in the SSO trio). react-toastify is the resident toast lib.
